title: Medical Laboratory Technician
description: Bristol-Myers Squibb is seeking a Medical Laboratory Technician for our Minneapolis facility. You'll perform laboratory analyses, maintain equipment, and support our pharmaceutical research and development operations. This hybrid role is essential to our mission of developing innovative medicines to treat patients.
responsibilities: Perform laboratory tests and analyses using standard procedures and protocols
Collect and prepare patient or research samples for testing
Operate laboratory equipment and instruments; perform routine maintenance
Record and verify test results; maintain accurate laboratory records
Quality assurance testing and adherence to laboratory standards

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Clinical Laboratory Science or High School diploma with certification
skills: Proficiency with laboratory equipment and instrumentation
Knowledge of laboratory safety and quality standards
Strong attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to follow laboratory protocols and procedures
certifications: Clinical Laboratory Technician (CLT) or Medical Laboratory Technician (MLT) certification

benefits: Paid time off and paid holidays
